title: [Bug]: could not start api proxy since expected pipe is not available
body:
### Issue Description

podman 4.3.1 on Windows 11 under WSL-2, starting the machine results in API forwarding not working.

### Steps to reproduce the issue

Steps to reproduce the issue
1. install podman
2. `podman machine stop`
3. `podman machine start`


### Describe the results you received

```
API forwarding for Docker API clients is not available due to the following startup failures.
        could not start api proxy since expected pipe is not available: podman-machine-default

Podman clients are still able to connect.
```

### Describe the results you expected

API forwarding to work

### Additional information

comments.body:
I'm still having this problem too. It doesn't happen on Windows 10, but I don't know if it's related to the OS.
It happens even after reinstalling on a completely clean (formatted) PC.
I believe this is fixed by #17228. Reopen if not.
